evaluators.name: Earliest In-Person Evening Anxiety Session Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a confirmed in-person individual counseling appointment for anxiety near ZIP 94103 between 5–8 pm within the next 7 days, and whether it is the earliest qualifying slot.

evaluators.name: Sliding-Scale Trauma Therapists Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the two cheapest qualifying trauma-focused sliding-scale therapists (max sliding-scale fee ≤ $80) to the comparison list and viewed the comparison.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Plan Insurance/Billing Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user identified the lowest-copay plan (copay ≤ $30) and submitted an insurance/billing contact message referencing that plan and its copay.

evaluators.name: Social Anxiety Group Next-Month Evening Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered (after the baseline time) for a social-anxiety group starting next calendar month, using a weekday 6–8 pm session for one participant with a pay-later option.

evaluators.name: Weekend Online Free Consult Draft Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user started booking (created a draft appointment) for a weekend online free 15-minute consultation with a therapist who offers weekend availability and free consults, using that therapist’s earliest available weekend consult slot.

evaluators.name: Monthly Parenting & Families Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user subscribed to the email newsletter with a parenting- and family-focused topic and a monthly delivery frequency.

evaluators.name: Depression Assessment and Recommended Articles Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user completed the depression self-assessment (PHQ-9) using a middle response option for each question, saved the first two recommended articles to their reading list, and viewed the reading list.

evaluators.name: Safety Plan with Local Crisis Hotlines Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created and saved a safety plan including at least two distinct local crisis hotline contacts and non-empty entries for warning signs and coping strategies.
